name: text1
text:
Welcome to TrayBuddy!
Let me give you a brief introduction to this app.

name: text2
text: TrayBuddy is a multi-model desktop pet app with encryption support.

name: text3
text: This program aims to manage various desktop pet resources within a single application.

name: text4
text: The author wanted to use multiple desktop pets but didn't want to install many separate programs, so this project was born.

name: text5
text: You can right-click -> Mod Management to switch between different desktop pets.

name: text6
text:
This program supports encrypting your desktop pet packages.
Encrypted packages can only be parsed by this program, protecting the animation resources inside.

name: text7
text: This is perfect for creators who want to showcase their animation models without worrying about unauthorized use.

name: text8
text: In addition, this program offers various extra features.

name: text10
text: We have a Mod editor that lets you customize combinations of animations, text, and voice.

name: text9
text: We have Mod version management, supporting iterative updates for your creations.

name: text11
text: The program also supports memo and scheduled reminder features.

name: text12
text: We will keep improving and add more one-click Mod generation tools in the future.

name: text13
text: Finally, we hope this app can truly bring you joy.
